header.title: LLM Cost Planner
header.subtitle: Workload pricing, model migration, and developer-ready export

config.title: Configuration
config.summary: Analyzing {{current}} to {{candidate}} with {{cacheRate}} cache hit rate{{batchSuffix}}
config.help: Set up your workload: models, token volumes, optimization options, and time period for analysis
config.description: Export your current analysis setup as JSON to save, share, or document your exact configuration.
config.importFailed: Failed to import configuration. Check file format.
config.modelNotFound: One or more models not found in current dataset.
config.tipContent: Save configurations for different scenarios, share with team members, or use to reproduce specific analyses.

model.priceHelp: Prices shown as: input price / output price per 1M tokens
model.selectAria: Select {{label}}: model name with input/output prices per 1M tokens

tooltips.bestCache: Best-case cache hit rate with improved caching strategy

guardrails.title: Budget & Quota Guardrails
guardrails.setBudgetHint: Set a monthly budget to calculate request quota and overage risk.
guardrails.overBudgetHint: Reduce traffic, switch models, or raise budget.

cacheAnalyzer.title: Prompt Caching Impact
cacheAnalyzer.tip: Prompt caching stores frequently-used contexts like system prompts, documentation, or conversation history. Increase your cache hit rate above to see the impact.

batchAnalyzer.title: Batch Processing Impact
batchAnalyzer.note: Batch processing is ideal for non-real-time workloads. Enable it above to see the updated costs.

savings.title: Savings Tracker
savings.description: Projected savings from switching the selected workload to {{model}}.

summary.title: Board-Ready Summary

audienceHelp.developer: Developer report: token usage, input/output split, model delta
audienceHelp.pm: PM report: unit cost, rollout recommendation, risk-aware decision
audienceHelp.ceo: CEO report: savings, budget impact, margin risk

summary.reportHelp: The same analysis is rewritten for each audience. Developers get token and cost breakdowns, PMs get rollout decisions, and CEOs get savings plus risk.
summary.exportFailed: Export failed. Try again or use a screenshot.
summary.sourceLabel: Prices based on official API docs

workspace.advancedReviewDescription: Budget guardrails and developer diagnostics are supporting information for the MVP. Open this when you need operating checks such as budget overrun, cost spikes, or model requirement details.

usageSetup.title: 1. Usage setup
usageSetup.description: Start from real traffic, feature mix, cacheable patterns, and batchable work before comparing model prices.
usageSetup.batchEligible: Batch eligible traffic can use async pricing

usageImport.title: Start with real LLM logs
usageImport.description: Paste or upload a usage CSV so developers do not have to guess average input/output tokens.
usageImport.csvHelp: Required columns: feature, model, input_tokens, output_tokens. total_cost is optional.
usageImport.error: Paste at least one usage row with headers.
usageImport.noManualTokens: Token fields are read from logs first. Manual inputs stay available as a fallback.

unitEconomics.title: Feature cost and margin
unitEconomics.description: Use imported logs to see which AI features make money or lose money at a selling price.
unitEconomics.priceHelp: Default selling price. Override it per feature in the table.

featureCost.title: Feature cost drivers
featureCost.description: See which AI feature consumes the most monthly LLM cost before deciding what to optimize.
featureCost.topShareHelp: {{feature}} is the largest cost driver in this scenario.
featureCost.topCostHelp: Estimated model API cost for the top feature.

currentCost.title: 2. Current model cost
currentCost.description: This is what the current structure costs before any model switch or optimization lever.

alternative.title: 3. Alternative comparison
alternative.description: Savings stay visible, but the model switch is judged beside quality, latency, risk, context, and tool behavior.
alternative.annualDelta: Annual delta {{delta}}; validate the assumptions beside this number.

savingsLevers.title: 4. Savings lever recommendation
savingsLevers.description: Each lever is conditional: the table shows savings potential and the operational trade-off beside it.

model-switch.risk: Quality degradation possible; validate task-level evals before routing all traffic.
model-switch.condition: Candidate must satisfy quality, latency, context, and tool-call requirements.

prompt-caching.risk: Requires repeatable prompt patterns; personalized context may not cache well.
prompt-caching.condition: Works when system prompts, policies, or retrieved context repeat across requests.
prompt-caching.conditionEmpty: Needs repeatable prompt or context blocks before savings are available.
prompt-caching.use: RAG system prompts, fixed policy blocks

batch-processing.risk: Lower real-time responsiveness; unsuitable for interactive user-facing paths.
batch-processing.condition: Works for traffic that can wait for asynchronous processing.
batch-processing.conditionEmpty: Needs offline or delayed work before savings are available.

output-token-cap.risk: Answer quality can degrade when summaries or explanations are cut too aggressively.
output-token-cap.condition: Works when concise outputs are acceptable and answer completeness is monitored.

feature-routing.risk: Higher implementation complexity; requires feature-specific quality thresholds.
feature-routing.condition: Works when cheap models can safely handle only some request classes.
feature-routing.use: Operational AI apps with mixed features

businessMetric.title: Cost Per Business Metric
businessMetric.description: Enter the denominator your business already tracks. The app divides model cost by that number; it does not infer tickets, jobs, users, or reports for you.
businessMetric.intro: Add a denominator you actually track, such as tickets, PRs, users, jobs, or transactions per month.
businessMetric.qualityHelp: Quality burden is retry, human review, and CS escalation cost divided by the same denominator.
businessMetric.empty: Add a denominator to compare cost per business metric. This panel does not invent proxy metrics.
businessMetric.validation: Enter a metric name and a denominator greater than 0.

report.qualityAssumption: Quality and risk values are editable assumptions, not benchmark claims.
report.sameModel: Current and candidate are the same model; migration delta is {{zero}}/month.
report.developerDeltaSame: Delta: same model selected, migration delta is {{zero}}/month
report.baseline: On {{current}} with {{inputTokens}} input / {{outputTokens}} output tokens/month{{cacheText}}{{batchText}}, estimated monthly cost is {{monthlyCost}} ({{annualCost}}/yr).
report.ceo: CEO savings summary: {{baseline}}{{decision}} Treat the savings as budget impact with quality and operational risk review before rollout.
report.pm: PM summary: {{baseline}}{{decision}} Recommended next step: run a limited rollout on low-risk features before broader migration.

errors.sameModel: Current and candidate are the same model
